messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] licensing of R code in financial institution code
messages.subject_clean: licensing of R code in financial institution code
messages.body_plain:
How is the industry addressing the pushback against GPL-x as described in https://r-posts.com/how-gpl-makes-me-leave-r-for-python/

Mark

messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] licensing of R code in financial institution code
messages.subject_clean: licensing of R code in financial institution code
messages.body_plain:
I haven't come across any realistic use cases for actuaries and data
scientists where this would be an issue, since they're usually not in the
business of building custom libraries to distribute as proprietary software.

If you're at a place where GPL software can't be used for analytics, it'd
be interesting to hear the arguments from the counsel.

On Fri, Mar 15, 2019 at 1:45 PM R. Mark Sharp <rmsharp at me.com> wrote:

> How is the industry addressing the pushback against GPL-x as described in
> https://r-posts.com/how-gpl-makes-me-leave-r-for-python/
